JAAMAGIANCIENT-MELTING_PERMAFROST.descri: Whenever you play a Power, gain [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
JAAMAGIANCIENT-MELTING_PERMAFROST.title: Melting Permafrost
JAAMAGIANCIENT-COLD_SPARK.title: Cold Spark
JAAMAGIANCIENT-COLD_SPARK.description: The first time each turn you reach [blue]15[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-COLD_SPARK.flavor: Could give great power, if only the ice could be melted or broken.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-ICE_TEMPERED_INGOT.descri: At the end of each turn, if you have no [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]
JAAMAGIANCIENT-ICE_TEMPERED_INGOT.flavor: Nothing can bend or dent this ice-cold metal.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-ICE_TEMPERED_INGOT.title: Ice-Tempered Ingot
JAAMAGIANCIENT-SOLID_BLIZZARD.descriptio: [gold]Enchant[/gold] all cards that [gold]Block[/gold] in card rewards with [gold]Icy[/gold].
JAAMAGIANCIENT-SOLID_BLIZZARD.title: Solid Blizzard
JAAMAGIANCIENT-FREEZING_FLAME.descriptio: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. You can increase this amount at rest sites.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-FREEZING_FLAME.title: Freezing Flame
JAAMAGIANCIENT-FROSTED_FLAKES.descriptio: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] and heal all of your HP. Future healing from all sources is halved.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-FROSTED_FLAKES.title: Frosted Flakes
JAAMAGIANCIENT-BRITTLE_ICEBERG.descripti: Damage to your HP is doubled. [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-BRITTLE_ICEBERG.title: Brittle Iceberg
JAAMAGIANCIENT-PRESERVED_SOUL.descriptio: When you would die, heal all of your HP, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn instead (works once).
JAAMAGIANCIENT-PRESERVED_SOUL.flavor: A great amount of vital energy, ready to be freed in times of need.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-PRESERVED_SOUL.title: Preserved Soul
JAAMAGIANCIENT-CRYSTAL_SCALE.description: Add a [gold]Polar Shell[/gold] to your deck.
JAAMAGIANCIENT-CRYSTAL_SCALE.title: Crystal Scale
